test_cases.title: Validar E2E vinculación de tarjeta y alta de viaje desde App PAX para usuario colaborador de contractor con tarjeta preautorizada hold y cobro desde App Driver
db_queries: SELECT * FROM WALLET WHERE PASSENGER_ID = :passengerId ORDER BY CREATION_DATE DESC;
SELECT * FROM WALLET_CARD WHERE WALLET_ID = :walletId ORDER BY CREATION_DATE DESC;
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT_TRANSACTION WHERE TRAVEL_ID = :travelId ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC;
